records.question: What tv channels in Italy are part of the Classica series, broadcast in Italian, included in the Option package, and are not pay-per-view?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
WHERE tv_channel.series_name = 'Classica' AND tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no' AND tv_channel.country = 'Italy' AND tv_channel.language = 'Italian' AND tv_channel.package_option = 'Option'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM TV_Channel WHERE Country = 'Italy' AND series_name = 'Classica' AND Language = 'Italian' AND Package_Option = 'Option' AND Pay_per_view_PPV = 'No'

records.question: Which TV channels in the United Kingdom aired the cartoon titled Journey to the Center of the Bat! directed by Michael Chang?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE cartoon.title = 'Journey to the Center of the Bat!' AND cartoon.directed_by = 'Michael Chang' AND tv_channel.country = 'United Kingdom'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM TV_Channel AS T1 INNER JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T1.Country = 'United Kingdom' AND T2.Title = 'Journey to the Center of the Bat!' AND T2.Directed_by = 'Michael Chang'

records.question: Which TV channels under the Music Box Italia series broadcast in Italy in Italian, are not high definition or pay-per-view, and are included in the Sky Famiglia package?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
WHERE tv_channel.series_name = 'Music Box Italia' AND tv_channel.country = 'Italy' AND tv_channel.hight_definition_tv = 'no' AND tv_channel.language = 'Italian' AND tv_channel.pay_per_view_ppv = 'no' AND tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM TV_Channel WHERE series_name = 'Music Box Italia' AND Country = 'Italy' AND Language = 'Italian' AND Hight_definition_TV = 'No' AND Pay_per_view_PPV = 'No' AND Package_Option = 'Sky Famiglia'

records.question: Which TV channels that have a pixel aspect ratio of 4:3 and belong to the Sky Famiglia package, with music content, also air cartoons titled The Rise of the Blue Beetle! written by Michael Jelenic and TV series with a weekly rank of 71.0, share of 6.0, and rating of 3.7?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_series.weekly_rank = 71.0 AND tv_series.share = 6.0 AND cartoon.written_by = 'Michael Jelenic' AND tv_series.rating = '3.7' AND tv_channel.pixel_aspect_ratio_par = '4:3' AND tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND tv_channel.content = 'music' AND cartoon.title = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM TV_Channel AS T1 INNER JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel INNER JOIN TV_series AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.Channel WHERE T1.Pixel_aspect_ratio_PAR = '4:3' AND T1.Package_Option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND T1.Content = 'Music' AND T2.Title = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!' AND T2.Written_by = 'Michael Jelenic' AND T3.Weekly_Rank = 71.0 AND T3.Share = 6.0 AND T3.Rating = '3.7'

records.question: Which TV channels have cartoons and also air series where the rating is exactly 3.7?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_series.rating = '3.7'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Channel FROM Cartoon AS T1 INTERSECT SELECT T2.Channel FROM TV_series AS T2 WHERE T2.Rating = '3.7'

records.question: Which Italian tv channels that are not high definition have cartoons?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_channel.language = 'Italian' AND tv_channel.hight_definition_tv = 'no'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM TV_Channel AS T1 INNER JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T1.Country = 'Italy' AND T1.Hight_definition_TV = 'No'

records.question: Which TV channels are included in the Sky Famiglia package and are not available in high definition?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
WHERE tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND tv_channel.hight_definition_tv = 'no'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM TV_Channel WHERE Package_Option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND Hight_definition_TV = 'No'

records.question: Which English-language TV channels have series with a share of at most 7.0 and also air cartoons written by Steven Melching?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN tv_series ON tv_channel.id = tv_series.channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_channel.language = 'English' AND tv_series.share <= 7.0 AND cartoon.written_by = 'Steven Melching'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM TV_Channel AS T1 INNER JOIN TV_series AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel INNER JOIN Cartoon AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.Channel WHERE T1.Language = 'English' AND T2.Share <= 7.0 AND T3.Written_by = 'Steven Melching'

records.question: Which TV channels where content is music, series name is MTV Rocks, package option is Sky Famiglia, and that are not high definition air the cartoon Enter the Outsiders! with a production code of at least 106.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
JOIN cartoon ON tv_channel.id = cartoon.channel
WHERE tv_channel.content = 'music' AND tv_channel.hight_definition_tv = 'no' AND cartoon.title = 'Enter the Outsiders!' AND tv_channel.series_name = 'MTV Rocks' AND cartoon.production_code >= 106.0 AND tv_channel.package_option = 'Sky Famiglia'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM TV_Channel AS T1 INNER JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T1.Content = 'Music' AND T1.series_name = 'MTV Rocks' AND T1.Package_Option = 'Sky Famiglia' AND T1.Hight_definition_TV != 'Yes' AND T2.Title = 'Enter the Outsiders!' AND T2.Production_code >= 106.0

records.question: Which TV channels have content that is music and belong to the series name MTV Live HD?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tv_channel.id FROM tv_channel
WHERE tv_channel.content = 'music' AND tv_channel.series_name = 'MTV Live HD'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM TV_Channel WHERE Content = 'Music' AND series_name = 'MTV Live HD'
